who: small private practice medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For small private practice medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of patient data and medical codes.
problem: inaccurate billing and coding leading to delayed payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to small clinics with demo video
Participate in forums for medical practice tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for patient info
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the offer and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set up reminder schedules for follow-ups
Enable CSV import for existing patient data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
